questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Arrhythmias
questions.question_text: Describe your approach to assessing a patient presenting with arrhythmias
expected_points: Assess arrhythmias using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to arrhythmias
Implement evidence-based interventions for arrhythmias
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in cardiology setting
